comments.comment: A stack test was conducted in 2007 and included hexachlorobenzene. The resultant site specific factor replaced estimation method used in previous years.

comments.comment: With the information available to NSPI in previous years, we did not trigger for carbon monoxide. With improvements made in measurement and calculation in 2007, we do now trigger and we have therefore begun reporting.

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: NSPI is fully compliant with regulations for emissions and management of materials related to its operations. In producing safe and reliable electricity at the lowest cost for Nova Scotians, NSPI considers efficiency of operations among other factors in achieving sustainable business solutions.
